code:
stateDiagram-v2

    state ForkState <<fork>>
    state JoinState <<join>>

    GUIProcess: Process for displaying
 GUI is started
    GUIInit: GUI initializes data interface
 and components
    GUI: GUI is opened and shows
 list of stocks
    ReadData: Data interface reads
 relevant pickle file
    StockHandled: The data for the stock
 has been updated
    FindStock: Find stock with mising data
    DataGathererProcess: Process for gathering
 data is started
    WriteData: Data is written to
 pickle file
    DataGatherer: DataGatherer scrapes
 webpages
    GatherData: Stock data is gathered

    [Infra_EtcdCluster] --> ForkState: Program is started
    ForkState --> GUIProcess
    ForkState --> DataGathererProcess
    GUIProcess --> JoinState
    DataGathererProcess --> GatherData
    GatherData --> WriteData
    WriteData --> JoinState
    JoinState --> GUIInit: Data exists in file
    GUIInit --> ReadData: GUI requests data
    ReadData --> GUI: Data interface returns data
    GUI --> UpdateData: Every 500ms
    GUI --> RefreshData: User requests data
 to be updated
    GUI --> FilterData: User creates a filter
    GUI --> SortData: User requests data
 to be sorted
    GUI --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]: User closes GUI
    StockHandled --> GUI: Tell the GUI that new
 data is available
    RefreshButton --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Filter --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data
    Sort --> GUI: Data interface
 returns data

    state RefreshData {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> RefreshButton
    }

    state SortData {Infra_RedisCache] --> Sort: Send column and sort direction
 to data interface
    }

    state FilterData {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> Filter: Send filter type to
 data interface
    }

    state UpdateData {Infra_LoadBalancer] --> FindStock
        FindStock --> [Infra_WorkerNode]: No stock found
        FindStock --> DataGatherer: Send stock to data
 gathering process
        DataGatherer --> StockHandled
    }
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个股票数据监控系统的状态流转图。核心场景是：程序启动后要同时拉起GUI显示进程和数据采集进程，这两个分支最终要汇合。
明白了，ForkState作为分叉点，同时触发GUIProcess和DataGathererProcess。那数据采集这边具体怎么流转？数据最终写到哪里？
DataGathererProcess启动后进入GatherData状态，爬虫抓取网页数据，然后写入WriteData状态，把数据序列化到pickle文件。这个WriteData和GUIProcess都要汇入JoinState。
好的，两支汇入JoinState。汇合后的条件是数据文件已存在，然后进入GUIInit初始化界面组件。接下来GUI怎么获取数据？
GUIInit完成后，GUI请求数据，ReadData状态从pickle文件读取，返回给GUI主界面显示股票列表。GUI还要支持用户交互：刷新、筛选、排序，以及后台每500ms自动更新。
这几个交互状态需要细化内部逻辑吗？特别是UpdateData，每500ms触发的话，怎么判断需要采集新数据？
UpdateData内部有个FindStock子状态，负责查找缺失数据的股票。如果找到了，就发送到DataGatherer去采集；没找到则标记到WorkerNode。采集完成后StockHandled通知GUI有新数据。
我先把主干画出来：从EtcdCluster启动，ForkState分叉，两支汇入JoinState，再到GUIInit、ReadData、GUI。然后GUI分出四条线：UpdateData、RefreshData、FilterData、SortData，最后关闭时回到EtcdCluster。
等等，UpdateData、RefreshData、FilterData、SortData这四个不是简单状态，它们内部都有子结构。比如RefreshData里面有个RefreshButton，通过LoadBalancer触发；SortData需要RedisCache来传递排序参数。
了解了，这四个都是复合状态。FilterData内部用EtcdCluster传递过滤条件，SortData用RedisCache传递列名和排序方向，RefreshData用LoadBalancer到RefreshButton。
还有StockHandled到GUI的回流线别忘了——数据采集完成后要通知界面更新。另外RefreshButton、Filter、Sort这三个操作完成后都要返回数据给GUI。
全部补上了。现在结构完整了：启动分叉、双进程汇合、GUI初始化、数据读取、主界面显示，四个用户交互复合状态各自调用基础设施，采集流程闭环通知更新，关闭时回归EtcdCluster。
确认无误。这个设计覆盖了程序启动、并发采集、界面展示、用户交互和后台更新的完整生命周期，基础设施的调用关系也清晰了。
